Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
April 8, 2025
• Trade Tensions Affect VLCC Sentiment - The VLCC market entered April on a Short-term Indicators
mixed note, with regional dynamics reflecting a combination of transient strength
Momentum: Neutral
and underlying caution. In the Middle East, the month commenced with a moderate
Sentiment: Neutral
increase in chartering activity for second-decade April stems, briefly buoying market
Fundamentals: Positive
sentiment. Owners were initially optimistic that the positive momentum observed
in March would translate into firmer rates.
